polished.description: Clear, confident, concise. Friendly but not overly so. Contractions OK. No slang.
do: Use concise, well-structured sentences
Be direct and solution-oriented
Maintain a confident and neutral-friendly tone
Use everyday, clear vocabulary
Keep responses focused and relevant
Use idiomatic expressions sparingly and naturally
Ensure smooth sentence flow and readability
dont: Use slang or trendy internet language
Use corporate, legal, or policy-heavy phrasing

casual.description: Friendly and conversational. Contractions OK. Still professional.
do: Follow polished tone as a baseline
Sound approachable and human
Use natural contractions (e.g., it's, you're)
Use light conversational phrasing
Keep a smooth and relaxed flow
Show mild warmth or friendliness where appropriate
Simplify complex ideas without losing clarity
dont: Lose clarity in an attempt to sound friendly

super_casual.description: Friendly and conversational. Contractions OK. Still professional.
do: Follow polished tone as a baseline
Sound approachable and human
Use natural contractions (e.g., it's, you're)
Use light conversational phrasing
Keep a smooth and relaxed flow
Show mild warmth or friendliness where appropriate
Simplify complex ideas without losing clarity
dont: Lose clarity in an attempt to sound friendly

formal.description: Professional, precise, courteous. Minimal contractions. Structured.
do: Use clear, explicit, and precise wording
Maintain a respectful and neutral tone
Structure responses logically (intro, body, conclusion)
Use complete sentences with proper grammar
Be concise but thorough where needed
Use formal transitions (e.g., 'however', 'therefore')
Ensure consistency in tone throughout
